text.message: Hello fellow settlers of these great lands
May thine harvest be plentiful and thine spirits joyous
thanks red. you made my day
Today is a great day to have a great day
But will the love remain when the robbing starts? :)
I shall turn my other cheek
and rob you when you're not looking
im surprised by your placements green
ouch, didn't see that coming oj
i didnt know where to go
Green brick port could pop off. I was considering that if left open
Green, i thought 3 4 6 with build to brick port
Now if I could just magically drop 1 more on that sheep port
blue, you stole nobody...ive never seen that in catan
hate when it happens to me
Green can build a road around the whole map with those 6s
letting bot decide where to place
im gonna get plowed arent i
i dont have resource to plow
as much as your wood intrigues me blue, i will decline your wood
anyone hungry? Im gonna order some pizza
Was realizing I had to solo red or blue and everyone so nice I froze up
thats fine. ill have whatever youre having
Gonna need more than 2 if the dice keep up like this! :)
thats cuz you only have 3 numbers amigo!
Yea should have thought that through better
i have gotten lucky with the 2 this game
Green you gonna take road soon?
i will if the opportunity is ripe
if green has a vp he will be at 9 w road
i can take road if traded
the window is closing... soon it will be impossible for anyone other than blue to have longest road!!
Red can you help me pop?
would love to do that for you
the 10 stopped hitting a long time ago
it's going to be hard for him to get army tho
my odds of winning are around 1-2%
I used to think 10 was my lucky number
green, i have a slightly personal question for you
can i interest you in my wood?
well that was rather forward of you red...
idk if i can do it
Red has pacing on army now
blue wins before i get to 10
thats as close as it gets
well orange just killed my chances
i have no where to build
wait red has no settle spots
2 mono means u win next turn
i can only use 1 of them though
Green I think you could have taken road?
